title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zappfresh - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zappfresh - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
